title: Fix large array initialization for I/O ports (#6904)

features.name: large unpacked array output port with wide elements
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with an unpacked array exceeding 256 elements where each element is wider than 64 bits

features.name: array assignment with default value initializer on output port
features.description: Code should include an assignment to an output port unpacked array using a default value initializer pattern
